ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID for the study reference */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the study was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors who conducted the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study's purpose and methods */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Type of study design (e.g., cohort, case-control) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic test (e.g., qSOFA, SIRS) */,
  "setting" TEXT /* Testing environment (e.g., ICU, non-ICU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic test (e.g., blood test, imaging) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the test */,
  "test_sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the test */,
  "test_specificity" TEXT /* Specificity of the test */,
  "test_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the test */,
  "test_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnostic test */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* True positives count */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* False positives count */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* False negatives count */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* True negatives count */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the condition in the study population */,
  "positive_predictive_value" TEXT /* Positive predictive value (PPV) of the test */,
  "negative_predictive_value" TEXT /* Negative predictive value (NPV) of the test */,
  "likelihood_ratio_positive" TEXT /* Likelihood ratio for positive results */,
  "likelihood_ratio_negative" TEXT /* Likelihood ratio for negative results */,
  "auc_roc" TEXT /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study or metrics */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object listing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., ICU, non-ICU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the setting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the setting */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of patients or participants the setting can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_settings" (
  "test_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-setting mapping */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnostic test */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the setting */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the setting where the test was conducted */,
  "test_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor or principal investigator for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_settings_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_tests ("test_id")
)
